title: zerna irkutensis
intro: Zerna irkutensis, also known as the Siberian wormwood or Zerna wormwood, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Zerna irkutensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
